summary: Crypto markets exhibit cautious optimism with Bitcoin prediction markets on Robinhood pricing strong probabilities above $80,000 by 5pm EDT today amid expectations of monetary easing and structural growth. Broader sentiment points to a maturing market transitioning to mass adoption, though futures open interest has dipped recently. Commodities and stocks lack specific intraday signals from top sources today.
